EARTH.description: the solid, the ground, the mineral, the enduring

WATER.description: the liquid, the flowing, the deep, the ice

AIR.description: breath, wind, sky, weather, void, scent, sound, silence

GREEN.description: the vegetal, growth, the rooted, harvest, rot

BODY.description: the physical form, anatomy, the mortal vessel

MIND.description: thought, reason, madness, dream, will, fear

SPIRIT.description: the animating, the soul, what persists, what haunts

WORD.description: language, record, sign, omen, pattern, the named
